_setup: 2. Fill in discord_token (main Based HQ listener bot)
3. For individual agent identities: create one Discord app per agent at discord.com/developers
Each app: Bot tab → Reset Token → copy token → paste into agent_tokens below
Then: OAuth2 → URL Generator → bot scope → Send Messages + Read Message History → invite to server
4. Agents without a token here will fall back to webhook (shows as 'Name APP')
5. You can add tokens one by one — each one you add immediately becomes a real Discord member
discord_token: token for your main Based HQ listener bot
exa_api_key: your exa key for web search

agent_tokens.chief-of-staff: Bot token for Chief of Staff
